title: Fit Meal Prep 50 Pack 4 oz Insulated Ripple Triple Wall Paper Coffee Cups with Black Lids, Premium Disposable, Brown To Go Anti Slip for Hot Beverage, Christmas, Travel, Office
features: Always Keeps Hot Beverages Warm: Our insulated paper coffee cups are designed to keep hot beverages hot for a longer period of time. The 3 insulation layers help to trap the heat inside the cup. Triple wall coffee cups with lids will not let you down in enjoying your favorite hot coffee, tea, or chocolate. Will let your hot beverage warm, from the first sip to finish.

Premium Coffee Cups Stay Leak-Free for over 7 Days: Our ripple wall paper coffee cup is made from superior-quality, eco-friendly, and recyclable paper material making it incredibly durable and long-lasting. FMP brown coffee cups underwent strict GMP protocols to ensure quality and food safety, are the most dependable option for your family.

Ideal To Go Coffee Cups: Anti Slip, Anti Scalding and No Messy Spills. No need to put sleeves! With triple layer rippled construction make it more comfortable to hold the cup. The dome lid seals tightly to prevent leak or spill and helps maintain beverage temperature. The cup includes a rolled rim for comfortable, leak-free drinking, poly-coated lining reduces condensation accumulation. Ideal travel cups without worrying about any leakage issues.

Affordable Set Perfect Size Coffee Cups: Set includes 50 pack 4 oz brown paper cups, 50 dome lids. Print-free appearance is perfect for customization, great for travel, serving coffee, party, home, office, travel, picnics, wedding and more.

Sturdy Packaging for Easy Storage: We utilize durable and designer-look cardboard boxes for packaging to ************************************************************* that the cups remain undamaged upon delivery, while also providing convenience for your use and storage. Stackable for optimal storage space, conveniently disposable for easy cleanup.
